name: Kubernetes Autoscaling: HPA, VPA & KEDA
description: Dynamically right-sizing Kubernetes workloads. Configuring Horizontal Pod Autoscaler (HPA) for CPU/memory scaling, Vertical Pod Autoscaler (VPA) for resource recommendation, and event-driven autoscaling with KEDA (Kubernetes Event-Driven Autoscaling) for queue-depth-based scaling.
